name: neuraldesk-desktop
description: NeuralDesk desktop application built with Electron.
author: vakav

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['dist','dist-test','dist-stream'].forEach(d=>{try{fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true})}catch(e){if(e.code!=='EBUSY') throw e; console.warn('skip busy dir:', d)}})"
scripts.dist:prod: npm run clean && npm run dist
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run dist
